question: What is the relative spatial relation between the person on stage and the microphone? Select from the following options: (A) The person is holding the microphone. (B) The person is sitting on the microphone. (C) The person is far away from the microphone. (D) The person is standing next to the microphone.
gold_answer: The person is standing next to the microphone
answer_choices: The person is holding the microphone
The person is sitting on the microphone
The person is far away from the microphone
The person is standing next to the microphone
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
